title: Durable Agent Memory Playbook
text: Durable agent memory keeps task state, tool traces, and long-horizon context available when assistants resume ongoing activity in later runs.
one_line_summary: A playbook for durable agent memory systems.

title: OpenAI Durable Workflow APIs
text: The durable workflow stack adds resumable steps, checkpointed state, and replay-safe execution for agent jobs.

why_it_matters: Useful when agents need resumable orchestration.
embedding_hint: OpenAI News durable workflow post with resumable agent APIs

title: Safety Benchmarks for Model Releases
text: Safety benchmarks measure jailbreak resistance, policy adherence, and monitoring coverage before a launch decision is made.
why_it_matters: Teams use benchmark evidence to support release governance.

title: Release Checklists and Launch Gates
text: Release governance checklists connect eval results, escalation thresholds, and holdback criteria to model launch gates.
one_line_summary: Launch gates depend on evaluation evidence.
why_it_matters: Governance processes need comparable benchmark signals.

title: Inference Batching Design
text: Inference batching improves throughput by grouping requests, balancing queues, and managing GPU utilization.

title: Hybrid Search Index Refresh
text: Hybrid search pipelines coordinate sparse signals, dense retrieval, and periodic index refresh jobs.
